# Kevin Middleton

> Full Stack Product Manager building platforms, internal tools, and AI workflows that connect teams and systems. 12+ years across consumer, enterprise, and platform SaaS. Currently open to product leadership roles.

## About

- [About Kevin](https://middleton.io/#about): Background, philosophy, and how he works as a "full-stack" PM across people, process, and product.
- [Values](https://middleton.io/#values): Operating principles — start with understanding, give grace get grace, collaboration wins, keep it human, structure without rigidity, make it simple.
- [What he's looking for](https://middleton.io/#looking-for): Product management, internal tools, platforms, public sector, AI workflows, integrations.

## Blog

<!-- BLOG:START -->
- [Blog index](https://middleton.io/blog/): Essays on building with AI, product, and the systems in between.
- [You should have a website. And you can build it in an hour with Claude.](https://middleton.io/blog/one-page-you-own/): An old colleague got laid off, shipped a personal site ten days after I sent him a starter kit, and took back his story online. So I turned the starter into a free plugin.
- [AI is researching you. Make sure it gets your story right.](https://middleton.io/blog/ai-is-researching-you/): ChatGPT showed up in my site's referrer logs. Companies are worrying about how they appear in AI search. The same logic applies to many of us.
- [How to Digitally Detox Right Now (Even If You're Job Searching)](https://middleton.io/blog/twice-a-day/): I check my inbox twice a day. Here's what a morning briefing from my AI assistant gave me back in a brutal job market.
- [Need an AI recruiter that works for you? Try this one.](https://middleton.io/blog/job-search-agent/): Open-sourced a Claude Code plugin that turns Claude into your job search assistant. The accessible version of the system I built for myself, free on GitHub.
- [I build web apps from my phone. Here's the whole setup.](https://middleton.io/blog/build-with-claude/): No code, no IDE, just a Telegram message. A Mac at home runs Claude Code, and a free guide gets you the same setup.
- [We're not building great AI tools for non-technical audiences (yet)](https://middleton.io/blog/ai-tools-non-technical/): I built a job scanner that runs while I sleep. I couldn't hand it to a smart, motivated friend. The gap between 'I want that' and 'I can do that' is still enormous.
- [What Running an AI Job Scanner Daily Actually Looks Like](https://middleton.io/blog/ai-job-scanner-daily/): Two weeks running my AI job scanner. The field report: extraction failures, a temporary block, duplicate noise, and what actually held up.
- [I Paid to Scrub My Data From Hundreds of Data Brokers. Then I Sent Even More to an AI.](https://middleton.io/blog/owning-your-context/): I pay a service to scrub my data from hundreds of brokers. Then I hand an AI my taxes, my finances, my fears. Where should that personal context actually live?
- [I Built an AI Job Search Assistant That Texts Me When It Finds Roles I Should Apply To](https://middleton.io/blog/ai-job-search-assistant/): How a Mac Mini in my apartment scans LinkedIn twice a day, filters for roles that match my profile, and texts me the results, for about six cents a day.
<!-- BLOG:END -->

## Case studies

- [HVAC.com — Calculators and Conversion Optimization](https://middleton.io/casestudies/case-study-hvac.html): Drove a large conversion lift through high-intent tools and continuous A/B testing.
- [Sendoso — eGift Platform Expansion and Square Partnership](https://middleton.io/casestudies/case-study-sendoso.html): Doubled eGift coverage to 1,600+ options across 47 countries; landed Square as strategic partner.
- [Lever — Moving Upmarket](https://middleton.io/casestudies/case-study-lever.html): Built HRIS Sync from zero; reduced migration time from days to minutes.
- [Rocket Lawyer — Co-Branded Partner Sites](https://middleton.io/casestudies/case-study-rocketlawyer-covea.html): Launched Rocket Lawyer's first enterprise partnership in six months, reaching millions of users.
- [Rocket Lawyer — Mobile Conversion Optimization](https://middleton.io/casestudies/case-study-rocketlawyer-mobile.html): Mobile conversion lift on the highest-revenue product line.
- [Oracle — Engage v2 and New Networks](https://middleton.io/casestudies/case-study-oracle.html): 36 new features in 12 months; doubled social network coverage.

## Projects he's building

- [QuietFeed](https://quietfeed.com/): RSS reader that respects your attention. No algorithm, no AI summarization, just feeds the user controls.
- [Job Search Agent](https://github.com/kevinmmiddleton/job-search-agent): Open-source Claude Code plugin that turns Claude into a job-search assistant. Scans, tracks, builds interview guides.
- [Build with Claude](https://github.com/kevinmmiddleton/build-with-claude): A step-by-step guide for non-technical people to build apps from their phone with Claude Code and Telegram.
- [Office Hours](https://middleton.io/officehours/): Free 30-minute conversations about product, AI, or whatever you're stuck on.
